summary: Email/password authentication fully tested and working. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All flows verified including registration, login, form validation, session persistence, error handling.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user successfully with email, password, name
POST /api/auth/register - Returns user_id, email, name, picture in response
POST /api/auth/register - Sets session_token cookie after registration
POST /api/auth/register - Rejects duplicate email with 400 error
POST /api/auth/register - Rejects invalid email format with 400 error
POST /api/auth/register - Rejects password shorter than 6 chars with 400 error
POST /api/auth/register - Rejects missing email field with 422 error
POST /api/auth/login - Logs in successfully with valid credentials
POST /api/auth/login - Returns 401 for wrong password
POST /api/auth/login - Returns 401 for non-existent user
POST /api/auth/login - Sets session_token cookie on success
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data for authenticated session
GET /api/auth/me - Returns 401 without session
GET /api/auth/me - Works with Authorization Bearer header
POST /api/auth/logout - Logs out user successfully
Full auth flow: register -> login -> verify session -> logout -> re-login works
Frontend: Sign In button opens AuthModal
Frontend: Hero 'Get Started' button opens AuthModal
Frontend: Registration form shows Full Name field when switching to register mode
Frontend: Empty form shows validation errors (Email is required, Password is required)
Frontend: Short password shows validation error (at least 6 characters)
Frontend: Invalid email shows browser validation
Frontend: Wrong password shows toast error 'Invalid email or password'
Frontend: Password visibility toggle works (eye icon)
Frontend: Registration redirects to dashboard on success
Frontend: Login redirects to dashboard on success
Frontend: Session persists after page reload

registration_api.details: POST /api/auth/register creates user, hashes password with salt, creates session, sets cookie

login_api.details: POST /api/auth/login verifies credentials, creates session, sets session_token cookie

session_verification.details: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with terms_accepted field, supports cookie and Bearer token

frontend_auth_modal.details: AuthModal component handles login/register modes, form validation, error display, mode switching

session_persistence.details: Session persists across page reloads when session_token cookie is set

terms_acceptance_flow.details: Users who haven't accepted terms are shown TermsAcceptance page before accessing dashboard

critical_code_review_comments: Password hashing uses PBKDF2-SHA256 with 100000 iterations and random salt - secure implementation
Session tokens are UUID-based with 'sess_' prefix and 7-day expiry
Auth supports both cookie-based and Bearer token authentication
Email is lowercased before storage to prevent duplicate accounts
AuthModal has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_auth_email_password.py - Created comprehensive test file with 14 tests
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_* prefixed users created during pytest for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email/password authentication is fully implemented and working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_auth_email_password.py covers all auth endpoints with 14 tests. Google OAuth still exists in parallel (via /api/auth/session endpoint). Session uses httponly cookies with 7-day expiry.
